description: Tier 1 Phase 15-1b acceptance fixture set — pre-fix baselines captured pre-Phase-15-2.

fixtures.name: (S)-alanine
fixtures.purpose: Atom-level CIP consumer (R/S at α-carbon); Phase 15-2a wires consumer.

baseline.comp: The structure is a three-carbon chain. The first carbon is bonded to the second carbon by a single bond. The second carbon bears an amine group (–NH₂). The third carbon bears a carboxylic acid group (–COOH). Each carbon carries implicit hydrogens. Contains one defined stereocenter.
baseline.std: A 6-atom, three-carbon chain with a carboxylic acid group (–COOH), and an amine group (–NH₂).
baseline.short: A three-carbon chain with a carboxylic acid and an amine.

fixtures.name: cis-2-butene
fixtures.purpose: Bond-level stereo consumer (cis/Z); Phase 15-2a wires consumer.

baseline.comp: The structure is a four-carbon chain. The first carbon is bonded to the second carbon by a single bond. The second carbon bears a carbon-carbon double bond (C=C). Each carbon carries implicit hydrogens.
baseline.std: A 4-atom, four-carbon chain with a carbon-carbon double bond (C=C).
baseline.short: A four-carbon chain with a double bond.

fixtures.name: trans-2-butene
fixtures.purpose: Bond-level stereo consumer (trans/E); disambiguates from #2; Phase 15-2a wires consumer.

baseline.comp: The structure is a four-carbon chain. The first carbon is bonded to the second carbon by a single bond. The second carbon bears a carbon-carbon double bond (C=C). Each carbon carries implicit hydrogens.
baseline.std: A 4-atom, four-carbon chain with a carbon-carbon double bond (C=C).
baseline.short: A four-carbon chain with a double bond.

fixtures.name: (R)-2-butanol
fixtures.purpose: Atom-level CIP consumer (R); already in migration baseline; Phase 15-2a wires consumer.

baseline.comp: The structure is a four-carbon chain. The first carbon is bonded to the second carbon by a single bond. The third carbon bears a hydroxyl group (–OH). Each carbon carries implicit hydrogens. Contains one defined stereocenter.
baseline.std: A 5-atom, four-carbon chain with a hydroxyl group (–OH).
baseline.short: A four-carbon chain with a hydroxyl group.

fixtures.name: butan-1-ol
fixtures.purpose: Chain locants — primary alcohol on terminal carbon; Phase 15-2b wires.

baseline.comp: The structure is a four-carbon chain. The first carbon is bonded to the second carbon by a single bond. The fourth carbon bears a hydroxyl group (–OH). Each carbon carries implicit hydrogens.
baseline.std: A 5-atom, four-carbon chain with a hydroxyl group (–OH).
baseline.short: A four-carbon chain with a hydroxyl group.

fixtures.name: butan-2-ol
fixtures.purpose: Chain locants — secondary alcohol on internal carbon; Phase 15-2b wires.

baseline.comp: The structure is a four-carbon chain. The first carbon is bonded to the second carbon by a single bond. The third carbon bears a hydroxyl group (–OH). Each carbon carries implicit hydrogens.
baseline.std: A 5-atom, four-carbon chain with a hydroxyl group (–OH).
baseline.short: A four-carbon chain with a hydroxyl group.

fixtures.name: tert-butanol
fixtures.purpose: Chain locants + branching — tertiary alcohol on quaternary carbon; Phase 15-2b wires.

baseline.comp: The structure is a three-carbon chain. The first carbon is bonded to the second carbon by a single bond. The second carbon bears a hydroxyl group (–OH). Each carbon carries implicit hydrogens.
baseline.std: A 5-atom, branched carbon chain with three carbons in the longest path with a hydroxyl group (–OH).
baseline.short: A three-carbon chain with a hydroxyl group.

baseline.comp: The structure is a three-carbon chain. The first carbon is bonded to the second carbon by a single bond. The third carbon bears an amine group (–NH₂). Each carbon carries implicit hydrogens.
baseline.std: A 4-atom, three-carbon chain with an amine group (–NH₂).
baseline.short: A three-carbon chain with an amine.

baseline.comp: The structure is a three-carbon chain. The first carbon is bonded to the second carbon by a single bond. Each carbon carries implicit hydrogens.
The structure is a single carbon atom.

fixtures.name: diethyl ether
fixtures.purpose: Acyclic ether group classification; Phase 15-2c adds.

baseline.comp: The structure is a two-carbon chain. The first carbon is bonded to the second carbon by a single bond. Each carbon carries implicit hydrogens.
A single carbon bearing an amine group (–NH₂).
baseline.std: A methyl group bonded to an amine group (–NH₂).
baseline.short: A one-carbon chain with an amine.

baseline.comp: A single carbon bearing an amine group (–NH₂).
baseline.std: A single carbon bearing an amine group (–NH₂).
baseline.short: A single carbon bearing an amine.

baseline.comp: A single carbon bearing an amine group (–NH₂).
baseline.std: A single carbon bearing an amine group (–NH₂).
baseline.short: A single carbon bearing an amine.

fixtures.name: acetone
fixtures.purpose: Ketone sanity canary — should already work; catches 15-2c classifier-ordering regressions.

baseline.comp: The structure is a three-carbon chain. The first carbon is bonded to the second carbon by a single bond. The second carbon bears a ketone group (C=O). Each carbon carries implicit hydrogens.
baseline.std: A 4-atom, three-carbon chain with a ketone group (C=O).
baseline.short: A three-carbon chain with a ketone.
